name: Red Kidney Beans (Rajma)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the red kidney beans and boil them for 2-3 hours (or 1/2 hour in a pressure cooker).
2. In the meantime, prepare the masala by cooking onions, garlic, ginger, and tomatoes as you would for chicken curry.
3. Add the prepared masala to the beans and cook until most of the liquid has evaporated and the beans are soft and thoroughly cooked.
4. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve.
